title: Valerianoides nelsonii
taxonomy: Valerianoides nelsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It belongs to the order Dipsacales and the clade Asteridae. This classification indicates that Valerianoides nelsonii is part of the broader group of plants known as angiosperms, which reproduce through flowers. The family Valerianaceae includes around 200-300 species of flowering plants, primarily found in the Northern Hemisphere. Valerianoides nelsonii is a rare and unusual species within this family.
